description: Compressor leakage in line 5
remarks: Broken seal

description: Tablet weight variation during compression due to machine vibration
remarks: Vibration-induced feed inconsistency

description: Tablet weight variation during compression due to machine vibration
remarks: Vibration-induced feed inconsistency
correctionAction: Machine adjusted

description: Warehouse Management System (WMS) database sync error causing pallet location mismatch in the automated storage system.
remarks: Software bug in the API handshake between the conveyor controller and the database.
correctionAction: Manual database reconciliation and physical audit of bin locations.

description: Severe power surge in the Quality Control lab caused a catastrophic failure of the HPLC mainboard.
remarks: Electrical grid instability during thunderstorm.
correctionAction: Sourced replacement mainboard and installed surge protector.

description: Spontaneous crystallization observed in the bulk API solution during storage at 4 C, despite being within the solubility limit.
remarks: Nucleation triggered by micro-scratches on the internal surface of the new glass carboy.
correctionAction: Solution warmed to 25 C to re-dissolve and stability testing initiated.

description: Spontaneous crystallization observed in the bulk API solution during storage at 4 C, despite being within the solubility limit.
remarks: Nucleation triggered by micro-scratches on the internal surface of the new glass carboy.
correctionAction: Solution warmed to 25 C to re-dissolve and stability testing initiated.

description: Sterilization cycle in Autoclave #4 failed to reach the required 121C setpoint for the full 20-minute duration.
remarks: Degraded door seal causing steam pressure loss during the plateau phase.
correctionAction: Batch quarantined and autoclave door gasket replaced after inspection.

description: Excessive heat generation in the primary data center from server rack #12 overheating.
remarks: Mechanical wear and failure of the redundant brushless cooling fan assembly in Rack #12.
correctionAction: Emergency portable AC unit deployed and server loads migrated to secondary node.

description: Blocked HVAC filters caused insufficient air circulation, leading to temperature rise in the dispensing booth. Filters were cleaned and conditions restored.
remarks: Blocked HVAC filters caused insufficient air circulation, leading to temperature rise in the dispensing booth. Filters were cleaned and conditions restored.

description: During sterile filtration, a sudden drop in filtration rate was observed, causing delay in batch processing. The filter unit showed signs of clogging.
remarks: During sterile filtration, a sudden drop in filtration rate was observed, causing delay in batch processing. The filter unit showed signs of clogging.
